coupon.source_phrase_block: PLEASE NOTE: This is an electronic code that you will receive via email. You must purchase your tickets through the institution before your visit. This library pass discounts tickets at a 2-for-1 rate. You can buy up to 4 tickets for the price of just 2. Weekdays in late May to early October. Ferry from Boston to Spectacle Island runs Thursday through Sunday in the fall. Summer Schedule: June 20 – September 2 Boston to Spectacle Island: Monday through Friday Boston to Georges Island: Monday through Friday
